segments.text: 故校之以計，而索其情，曰：主孰有道？將孰有能？天地孰得？法令孰行？兵眾孰強？士卒孰練？賞罰孰明？吾以此知勝負矣。

draftRationale.segmentation: Single long sentence with parallel structure of seven interrogative clauses. While it exceeds 48 characters, the text forms a cohesive rhetorical unit with an introduction (故校之以計，而索其情，曰：), seven parallel questions, and a concluding statement. Splitting would disrupt the reading flow of this classical rhetorical pattern.
